mitre_tactics.justification: Valid Accounts (Initial Access) — Use of compromised legitimate credentials to gain initial or persistent access. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
mitre_tactics.justification: Exploit Public-Facing Application (Initial Access) — Exploitation of vulnerability in internet-facing application to achieve code execution. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Exploitation for Client Execution
mitre_tactics.justification: Exploitation for Client Execution (Execution) — Exploitation of software vulnerability in client applications to achieve code execution. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.
